com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues

Class PStructFixedQueue<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractStructRing<T>
          • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues.PStructFixedQueue<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PStructFixedQueue<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractStructRing<T>
    A fixed-capacity native struct FIFO queue that rejects when full.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructFixedQueue(NativeAllocator allocator, StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long capacity)
      Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the given allocator.
      PStructFixedQueue(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long capacity)
      Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the system allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void dequeue()
      Removes the head element, zeroing its slot.
      T enqueue()
      Enqueues a zeroed element at the tail and returns its view.
      T enqueue(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
      Enqueues an element, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
      boolean offer(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
      Enqueues and initializes an element if room remains.
      T peek()
      Creates a view of the head element.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractStructRing

        layout

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing

        clear

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructFixedQueue

        public PStructFixedQueue(StructLayout layout,
                         StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                         long capacity)
        Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        capacity - the fixed capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if capacity is not positive

      • PStructFixedQueue

        public PStructFixedQueue(NativeAllocator allocator,
                         StructLayout layout,
                         StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                         long capacity)
        Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        capacity - the fixed capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if capacity is not positive

    • Method Detail

      • enqueue

        public T enqueue()
        Enqueues a zeroed element at the tail and returns its view.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if full or closed

      • enqueue

        public T enqueue(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
        Enqueues an element, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
        Parameters:
        initializer - fills the fresh element
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if initializer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if full or closed

      • offer

        public boolean offer(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
        Enqueues and initializes an element if room remains.
        Parameters:
        initializer - fills the fresh element
        Returns:
        true if accepted, false if full
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if initializer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • peek

        public T peek()
        Creates a view of the head element.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • dequeue

        public void dequeue()
        Removes the head element, zeroing its slot.
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
